# Pull request

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] build
- [ ] ci
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] perf
- [ ] test
- [ ] style
- [ ] revert

## Scope

`<area>` (e.g. `l3`, `cvp`, `provider`, `docs`).

## Summary

- _What changed?_
- _Why?_

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a Conventional Commit subject (`type(scope): subject`).
- [ ] `make all` passes (build + test + lint).
- [ ] `make lint-docs` passes (markdown + mermaid + yaml + spell).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] Tests added or updated.

## Linked issues

Closes #
